item.name: 11 — Internal Invoices
item.description: Finance invoice processing (3-way match). Route: /api/v1/invoices — RequireManager

item.name: 12 — Reports
item.description: Analytics and export reports. Route: /api/v1/reports — RequireViewer

exec: var j = pm.response.json(); if(j.id) pm.collectionVariables.set('file_id', j.id);

item.name: 15 — Lookup (Master Data)
item.description: Cached master data for dropdowns. Route: /api/v1/lookup

item.name: 16 — Supplier Auth (Portal)
item.description: Supplier portal authentication. Route: /api/v1/supplier/auth — ALL PUBLIC except logout/change-password

exec: var j = pm.response.json(); if(j.contactId) pm.collectionVariables.set('contact_id', j.contactId);

item.name: 17 — Supplier Profile (Portal)
item.description: Supplier portal — own profile management. Route: /api/v1/supplier/profile — RequireSupplier

item.name: 18 — Supplier Purchase Orders (Portal)
item.description: Supplier portal — view and respond to POs. Route: /api/v1/supplier/purchase-orders — RequireSupplier + Active

item.name: 19 — Supplier Invoices (Portal)
item.description: Supplier portal — submit and track invoices. Route: /api/v1/supplier/invoices — RequireSupplier + Active

exec: var j = pm.response.json(); if(j.id) pm.collectionVariables.set('invoice_id', j.id);

item.name: 20 — Supplier Catalogue (Portal)
item.description: Supplier portal — manage product catalogue. Route: /api/v1/supplier/catalogue — RequireSupplier + Active

item.name: 21 — Supplier Dashboard (Portal)
item.description: Supplier portal — performance dashboard. Route: /api/v1/supplier/dashboard — RequireSupplier + Active
